sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ عَلِيٌّ أَنْ يَحْفَظَ قَصِيدَةً قَصِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Ali je htio zapamtiti kratku pjesmu.
sentences.translationEn: Ali wanted to memorize a short poem.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ القَصِيدَةَ مَرَّاتٍ كَثِيرَةً حَتَّى حَفِظَهَا.
sentences.translation: Čitao je pjesmu mnogo puta dok je nije zapamtio.
sentences.translationEn: He read the poem many times until he memorized it.

sentences.translation: Recitovao je pjesmu pred razredom s pouzdanjem.
sentences.translationEn: He recited the poem in front of the class with confidence.

sentences.translation: Zadobio je divljenje nastavnika i svih učenika.
sentences.translationEn: He earned the admiration of the teacher and all the students.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ عَلِيٌّ أَنْ يَحْفَظَ قَصِيدَةً أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Ali je odlučio zapamtiti još jednu pjesmu.
sentences.translationEn: Ali decided to memorize another poem.
